name: Rei Suwa
description: Rei is a man of few words who doesn't mind that Kazuki has already moved into his house. He is physically strong, and his fighting abilities and marksmanship are among the best in the industry. He has a clear separation between his professional and personal lives and spends most of his time at home playing video games. When his name is written horizontally it resembles zetsubou ("beyond hope" or "despair"), befitting his extremely negative, paranoid and pessimistic attitude. She often worries about keeping her identity as a robot from others, despite the fact that everyone already knows about it due to the noticeable wind-up key exposed on her back. Luckily most don't make a big fuss about it. Her limbs will sometimes fall apart, revealing dubious items that Professor has installed without her noticing, ranging from bean-firing-weapons to Swiss rolls. She is also the Professor's caretaker. name: Satoshi Isshiki
description: He is a student at Totsuki Culinary Academy, a resident of Polar Star Dormitory and the current 7th seat of the Elite Ten Council. Aside from that, Satoshi's position as one of the Elite 10 also promote a strong determination for his kouhai(junior),Yukihira Soma to drive his dream to become one of the 10 seat and could be a potential challenge for Soma due to his natural cooking abilities.

name: Miyagi
description: Miyagi is a store clerk at a special store. She's the observer of [Kusunoki](https://anilist.co/character/132152/Kusunoki). ~!In the end, Miyagi sells her remaining lifespan so she and Kusunoki can have 3 days of life left. This releases her of her observer duty, making her visible to everyone.!~

name: Fuutarou Uesugi
description: __Height:__ 178 cm (5'10'') Fuutarou is the main protagonist of the 5-toubun no Hanayome series. He is a student of the Asahiyama High School. He lives with his father, Isanari Uesugi, and younger sister, Raiha Uesugi, in a small apartment. He is a serious and hardworking high school student and a prodigy at the top of his grade. name: Demiurge
description: The Guardian of the Seventh floor of Nazarick, with the form of a demon wearing glasses. Demiurge is very intelligent, but is also considered the most evil NPC on Nazarick. He greatly enjoys the suffering of others, made clear by his vicious experiments on prisoners. He's in charge of tactics and defenses of Nazarick. Among the Guardians, he gets along the best with Mare, since he understands the more cunning side of the Dark Elf.

name: Fran
description: __Race:__ Beastman __Species:__ Black Cat __Class:__ Swordlord Fran is the main female protagonist of the Tensei Shitara Ken Deshita story. She is normally stoic and expressionless, Fran can be quick to anger when her race is insulted and is almost completely unafraid of the idea of displaying violence and mercilessness for the sake of achieving her goals. She views most Blue Catkin with hostility due to their betrayal and selling of her people into slavery. Fran will express happiness or excite

name: Garp
description: __Height:__ 287 cm (9'5") __Affiliation:__ Marine __Position:__ Vice Admiral Garp is a Marine hero who was famous for cornering the late Pirate King, Gold Roger, numerous times in his career. name: Isaac Dian
nativeName: アイザック・ディアン
description: Issac Dian forms one half of the bumbling thief couple, who seem to cross into everybody's story in one way or another. He's in love with Miria, and they've robbed everything and anything, from doors to the entire Genoard household. He's completely clueless, super eccentric and happy-go-lucky to the point you can't stop laughing from his bold and sometimes completely weird actions. He has a cameo appearance in Durarara!!

name: Schierke
description: Schierke is a young witch-in-training, a disciple of the witch Flora. She is accompanied by an elf, Evarella. She aided Guts's group with a troll infestation in the nearby village Enoch, where she showed how powerful magic can be in Berserk. After a series of events, Schierke was forced to leave her home and Flora behind forever when they faced an attack Griffith ordered. name: Toua Tokuchi
description: __Height:__ 183 cm (5’11") Toua is a successful gambler, and a pitcher in the game One Outs. After losing a game of One Outs for the first time , he joins the Lycaons with an odd contract, the One Outs contract, that decides Toua's pay based on his performance. As the Lycaons' famed star pitcher, he can pitch entire games without giving up a single hit.
